original_image_tags: Faint circular stamp in lower right corner, partially illegible, appears to be a received or filed stamp.

elements.description: Top of page: a rectangular stamp containing the text 'Classification of SECRET', with handwritten initials and the date '15-6-49' inside. A second, larger, faint circular stamp is partially visible at the bottom right.

judge.reason: Description A claims a circular stamp with illegible text in the lower right, while Description B claims a rectangular stamp with specific, quoted text ('Classification of SECRET', '15-6-49') at the top, which is a clear contradiction on the type, location, and content of the visual element.
